properties.name: zeta.worker.enabled
properties.description: Enable standalone Worker mode for cluster-wide hot key detection.

properties.name: zeta.worker.routing.app-name
properties.description: Application name for Worker-side report queue routing.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.report-exchange
properties.description: Name of the DirectExchange for receiving app-to-Worker report messages.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.broadcast-exchange
properties.description: Name of the FanoutExchange for broadcasting HOT/COOL decisions.

properties.name: zeta.worker.messaging.heartbeat-exchange
properties.description: Name of the TopicExchange for epoch-driven structured worker heartbeats.

properties.name: zeta.worker.sliding-window.duration-ms
properties.description: Total duration in milliseconds of the sliding window for QPS tracking.

properties.name: zeta.worker.sliding-window.slices
properties.description: Number of time slices within the sliding window.

properties.name: zeta.worker.threshold.hot-threshold
properties.description: Absolute QPS threshold for HOT key classification. A value of -1 disables absolute threshold.

properties.name: zeta.worker.threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Ratio-based threshold for HOT key classification (fraction of total QPS).

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.confirm-duration-ms
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds a key must remain hot before emitting a HOT decision.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.cool-duration-ms
properties.description: Duration in milliseconds a key must remain cool before emitting a COOL decision.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.pre-cool-grace-ms
properties.description: Grace period in milliseconds in the pre-cooling state before confirming cool.

properties.name: zeta.worker.state-machine.evict-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in ms for evicting stale sliding-window and state-machine state.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.qps-change-tolerance
properties.description: Tolerance factor for QPS change before recalculating dynamic thresholds.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.learning-period-ms
properties.description: Learning period in milliseconds for baseline QPS estimation.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.hot-threshold-ratio
properties.description: Dynamic hot threshold ratio relative to baseline QPS.

properties.name: zeta.worker.global-qps-dynamic-threshold.recalculate-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between dynamic threshold recalculations.

properties.name: zeta.worker.topk-validation.validate-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds for TopK pre-warm validation cycles.

properties.name: zeta.worker.topk-validation.pre-warm-count
properties.description: Number of top-K entries to pre-warm validate before broadcasting HOT.

properties.name: zeta.worker.topk-validation.pre-warm-min-appearances
properties.description: Minimum appearances in consecutive validation cycles to confirm a pre-warm HOT.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.top-k
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper top-K capacity.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.width
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper sketch width.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.depth
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper sketch depth.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.decay
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper decay factor.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heavy-keeper.min-count
properties.description: Worker-scoped HeavyKeeper minimum frequency count.

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.prior-mean
properties.description: Prior mean of the log-frequency distribution for Normal-Normal conjugate Bayesian confidence estimation. The default ln(10) makes a key with 10 observed accesses per window neutral (posterior mean = prior mean).

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.prior-std
properties.description: Prior standard deviation of the log-frequency distribution. Larger values make the estimator rely more on observed data; smaller values anchor more to the prior.

properties.name: zeta.worker.bayesian.likelihood-std
properties.description: Base likelihood standard deviation of the observed log-count. Adjusted dynamically by the coefficient of variation (CV) of sliding-window sums to account for traffic variability.

properties.name: zeta.worker.heartbeat.ping-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between structured heartbeat sends (epoch, loadFactor, decisionVersionHwm, config gossip).

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Whether TopK persistence to Redis is enabled for warm-start after Worker restart.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.persist-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between periodic TopK snapshots.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.top-k-count
properties.description: Number of top keys to persist per snapshot.

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.redis-key-prefix
properties.description: Redis key prefix for persisted TopK data (final key = prefix + appName + ':' + nodeId).

properties.name: zeta.worker.persistence.ttl-days
properties.description: TTL in days for persisted TopK data in Redis.
